scenarios.name: should allow non-indexed-access type aliases
scenarios.given: a type alias that does not use indexed access syntax

scenarios.name: should allow object types with index signatures
scenarios.given: an object type that declares an index signature
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because index signatures are not indexed access types

scenarios.name: should report indexed access types such as Obj['key']
scenarios.given: a type annotation using an indexed access type T['key']

scenarios.name: should report indexed access types such as Arr[number]
scenarios.given: a type annotation using an indexed access type T[number]
